name: Detroit Property Exchange
description_short: Detroit Property Exchange is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 3.6/5 with 91 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Detroit Property Exchange is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 3.6/5.0 Google rating from 91 reviews, Detroit Property Exchange has an solid reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Detroit Property Exchange specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Detroit Property Exchange operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Detroit Property Exchange should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
